checks.title: TLS endpoint reachable
checks.remediation: Verify TLS endpoint is reachable and serving valid certificates

checks.title: HSTS header present with preload + includeSubDomains
checks.remediation: Add Strict-Transport-Security header with includeSubDomains and preload

checks.title: TLS version is modern
checks.remediation: Ensure TLS 1.2+ only — disable SSLv3, TLS 1.0, TLS 1.1

checks.title: Server header suppressed
checks.remediation: Remove Server header from responses (Caddy: header -Server)

checks.title: TLS certificate accepted by client
checks.evidence: HTTPS connection established — certificate chain valid for this client
checks.remediation: Ensure ACME auto-renewal is operational — test before cert expiry

checks.title: HTTP→HTTPS redirect active
checks.remediation: Ensure port 80 redirects to HTTPS — never serves content over HTTP

checks.title: All security headers present
checks.remediation: Deploy security headers: X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy

checks.title: Proper 404 returned
checks.remediation: Return proper 404 for missing paths — remove try_files fallback to homepage

checks.title: Dangerous HTTP methods blocked
checks.remediation: Reject dangerous HTTP methods (TRACE, DELETE, PUT) on static content server

checks.title: Path traversal blocked
checks.remediation: Ensure web server rejects path traversal attempts

checks.title: No directory listing
checks.evidence: Response does not contain listing indicators
checks.remediation: Disable directory listing in web server configuration

checks.title: X-Frame-Options header present
checks.remediation: Add X-Frame-Options: DENY to prevent clickjacking

checks.title: Depot endpoint reachable
checks.remediation: Verify depot is serving binary artifacts via HTTPS

checks.title: Depot rejects write methods
checks.remediation: Depot must be read-only via Caddy — no PUT/POST/DELETE on artifact paths

checks.title: checksums.toml available with hash data
checks.remediation: Ensure checksums.toml is served from depot for BLAKE3 verification

checks.title: Depot directory listing disabled or styled
checks.remediation: Disable directory listing on depot paths

checks.title: Forgejo SSH reachable
checks.remediation: Verify Forgejo SSH is running and accepting key-based connections

checks.title: SSH password auth disabled
checks.remediation: Disable password authentication on SSH — key-only auth

checks.title: Forge web interface does not leak version
checks.remediation: Restrict Forgejo web interface access or suppress version headers

checks.title: No public repo listing
checks.evidence: Explore page does not expose repository list
checks.remediation: Disable public repository listing for unauthenticated users

checks.title: AXFR zone transfer rejected
checks.remediation: Ensure authoritative DNS rejects AXFR zone transfer requests

checks.title: DNSSEC keys published
checks.remediation: Enable DNSSEC on all authoritative zones

checks.title: NXDOMAIN for nonexistent subdomain
checks.evidence: No wildcard DNS — nonexistent subdomain does not resolve
checks.remediation: Ensure NXDOMAIN is returned for nonexistent subdomains (no wildcard)

checks.title: WireGuard silently drops invalid probes
checks.remediation: WireGuard should silently drop invalid packets — no response to probes

checks.title: WireGuard rejects invalid handshake initiation
checks.evidence: No response to fake handshake (expected — invalid key)
checks.remediation: WireGuard must reject handshake initiation with invalid keys

checks.title: Songbird federation port not externally reachable
checks.remediation: Songbird mesh should not expose internal topology to external probes
